title: Is Claude Mythos Coming?
summary: Nate Herk discusses a Mythos identifier leak on Anthropic's API and analyzes whether Claude Mythos is launching soon. He argues that the capability will likely fold into the next Claude Opus before any public launch, and suggests OpenAI's next move is the more important development to watch.
writeup: Nate Herk examines a "Mythos" identifier that surfaced in Anthropic's API and weighs whether it signals a near-term Claude Mythos launch. His read: the capability will most likely fold into the next Claude Opus rather than ship as a standalone public release. He also frames OpenAI's next move as the development that matters more to track.
